jobs.description: You will be working in the Asset Management Middle Office Trade Processing service, providing confirmation, affirmation and settlement services for Securities trading activity within UBS Asset Management. The Team is responsible for processing asset classes and instruments such as equities, fixed income, FX, TBA’s, Repo’s, money market products and collective funds. As a Senior Specialist, your role could also include supervision of other team members' work, taking part in development projects and potential leadership opportunities, depending on your skillset and open opportunities.

jobs.title: European Equity Research Leisure Analyst
jobs.description: We’re looking for a European Leisure analyst to spearhead research and analysis for the general Leisure sector. You will be responsible for identifying investment opportunities, providing strategic and analytical insights and building strong client relationships. This is an exciting opportunity to be part of a high-performing team with a strong platform. Key responsibilities including: • Conduct comprehensive equity research on companies within the general retail sector, including trends, competitive dynamics and financial performance. • Develop detailed financial models, forecasts and analysis using all the proprietary information the platform has to offer. • Produce high quality, actional research reports and recommendations. • Build and maintain relationships with clients, industry experts and company management teams. • Present investment ideas and sector insights to clients as well as sales and trading teams. • Mentor junior analysts fostering a collaborative and high performance culture

jobs.description: Your role : Are you equipped with solid knowledge on AML Transaction Monitoring but feel you still can do more in the field? Are you an innovative person ready to take part in process enhancements and roll-out of new monitoring scenarios? Do you want to work in a motivated team with senior stakeholders in a fast-paced business environment? We are currently looking for an AML TM Specialist to join our team. Your responsibilities will include: • Conducting comprehensive investigations of alerted transactions to identify potential Money Laundering and Terrorist Financing risks and escalating potentially suspicious activity to the local financial crime investigation unit for potential SAR filing, • Gathering and evaluating information from internal and external sources in order to understand transactions and parties to transactions, • Taking part in testing and implementation of the new AML Transaction Monitoring scenarios and systems, • Producing detailed MIs for AML TM Management, • Assessing and identifying key AML risks and process gaps.

jobs.title: Control Room & Advisory Compliance Officer

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile della conformità della sala di controllo e della consulenza

jobs.description: Do you know how to keep an eye out for and avoid risk? Do you make sensible calls in challenging situations, including knowing when to escalate? Do you have experience in Control Room and/or Investment Banking and Research Compliance Advisory? We are looking for someone to help: • provide independent and timely guidance to the UBS Global Research and Banking businesses on issues relating to day to day business, new business initiatives, regulatory developments, interactions with Banking and other parties outside Research; • maintain the quality of the information barriers applicable to the public and private sides of the bank; • assess regulatory requirements (e.g., ASIC, APRA, ASX or ACCC) to ensure compliance risks are identified, reported and tracked to their resolution; • analyse processes and systems and provide guidance to relevant stakeholders on the implementation of improved solutions that support business and mitigate compliance risk; • liaise with internal auditors on various requests in relation to compliance matters; • draft and deliver face to face training to the business; • review manuals and compliance notices to ensure they are properly revised or updated where necessary • draft new manuals, Compliance Notices, policies and procedures in light of regulatory amendments and/or business changes; • work with other members of the Compliance and Operational Risk Control team, locally and regionally to support the Compliance Framework; • respond to regulatory queries; and • perform local read across thematic reviews and assist with similar global reviews.

jobs.title: APAC Sanctions Officer
jobs.description: • Handle Sanctions-related advisory and escalations, and provide subject matter expertise (SME) on core risk areas to all relevant stakeholders in APAC across all Lines of Business • Execute the team’s day-to-day activities, including assessments of customer relationships with nexus to sanctioned countries and/or persons, transaction- and securities escalations, reputational risk reviews, drafting and negotiation of sanctions related legal clauses in collaboration with General Counsel (Legal), analysis and commenting on new regulatory and internal requirements, etc • Dealing with significant complex Sanctions issues, requiring detailed analysis and/or external legal advice/interaction with regulators etc • Assist with the continued effective implementation and refinement of a robust Sanctions risk and controls framework in APAC, in consultation with the Global Sanctions team • Produce and assist with maintenance of all relevant management information, including regular and accurate reporting to Management • Participate in regional and global projects and working groups; assist with internal audits, compliance monitoring & testing reviews • Deliver targeted Sanctions training to ensure employees in their areas of coverage receive training commensurate with the level of risk associated with their job responsibilities

We’re looking for a Market Director to: • be responsible for financial results, overseeing cost and risk management • attract, recruit, develop and retain skilled talent • coach all team members, getting them the right training and making sure development measures are results-oriented and transparent • manage and resolve all escalated issues, including financial, reputational, compliance, supervisory, operational and HR governance risks

jobs.description: Sind Sie eine initiative, kontaktfreudige Persönlichkeit? Und laufen Sie zur Hochform auf, wenn Sie Kunden und Kundinnen mit Hilfe der neusten Technologien beraten? Dann nehmen Sie doch mit uns Kontakt auf. Wir suchen eine Kollegin oder einen Kollegen, die/der ein Flair für die Anliegen der Kundschaft hat und sich in der digitalen Welt wohl fühlt. Und das sind Ihre Kernaufgaben: • Sie erfassen die vielseitigen Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden und Kundinnen präzis und beraten sie kompetent. • Sie haben ein ausgeprägtes Gespür für optimale Lösungen. Damit sichern Sie Kundenbeziehungen langfristig und punkten bei Neukunden und Neukundinnen. • Bei Ihrer Beratung setzen Sie auch auf innovative Tools und Apps. So nehmen Sie die Kundschaft auf unsere Reise in die Zukunft mit: Sie ermuntern sie, unsere digitalen Produkte einzusetzen und unterstützen Sie dabei.

jobs.title: Associate Market Executive
jobs.description: As an Associate Market Executive, you will be responsible for assisting with the day-to-day management and business growth within the Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky Market. We’re looking for an Associate Market Executive to: • Drive business growth and assist with the management and development of Financial Advisors • Manage and resolve escalated issues, including those that are financial, reputational, compliance, supervisory, operational, and HR Governance risks • Coach all team members, getting them the right training and making sure development measures are results-oriented and transparent • Assisting with running regular sales meetings, focusing on implementing growth initiatives, evaluate progress and create action plans to address underperformance

jobs.description: Looking to start your career in a company that encourages learning and professional growth? Is your dream job to be a member of a global team that works in a high-energy and diverse international environment? If this sounds interesting take your next career step with UBS! We are looking for a Tech Graduate Program – Software Engineer working with key business stakeholders across the globe. As a part of your team, you will • Build tech solutions that solve real business problems and strengthen UBS’s position as a digital-first financial services company. • Understand and analyze what the business needs - for the whole firm • Design and deliver long lasting solutions using modern programming languages. • Give suggestions, and help improve current processes and tools. • Make sure everything is properly tested and controlled before it goes from testing into real production. Tech Graduate Program You will be participating in our immersive global graduate program. Not only will you connect with peers worldwide, it will offer you: Hands-on Experience: Gain exposure to a variety of tech projects from day one. Cutting-Edge Technologies: Stay updated with the latest tech. Professional Development: Enhance your technical skills through training and understand our business. Guidance from experts: Receive insights, advice, and support from our experienced professionals. Environment: Collaborate, learn, and exchange ideas across organization. Career Advancement: 18 months comprehensive Tech Graduate Program kicks off in July 2026, ensuring your growth and success at UBS.

jobs.description: Do you want to help build best in class enterprise solutions using modern technology? Are you passionate about ensuring systems run reliably and meet the highest quality standards? Looking to start your career in a company that encourages continuous learning and professional growth? If this sounds exciting, take your next step with UBS! As part of our team, you will: • Contribute to creating, improving, and supporting modern technology solutions that help UBS remain the world’s leading global wealth manager. • Develop and maintain quality engineering solutions that strengthen UBS’s position as a digital first financial services company. • Design and execute robust testing approaches using modern programming languages and industry standard QE tools. • Suggest improvements and enhancements to existing testing solutions and processes. • Review and test code, participate in design discussions, and collaborate closely with developers and business stakeholders. • Ensure the reliability, stability, and accuracy of components before they reach production. • Investigate and analyze root causes of defects or production issues. • Document delivered solutions and testing outcomes clearly and thoroughly. • Review code and automation created by teammates and provide constructive feedback. Tech Graduate Program: You will be participating in our immersive global graduate program. Not only will you connect with peers worldwide, it will offer you: Hands-on Experience: Gain exposure to a variety of tech projects from day one. Cutting-Edge Technologies: Stay updated with the latest tech. Professional Development: Enhance your technical skills through training and understand our business. Guidance from experts: Receive insights, advice, and support from our experienced professionals. Environment: Collaborate, learn, and exchange ideas across organization. Career Advancement: 18 months comprehensive Tech Graduate Program kicks off in August 2026, ensuring your growth and success at UBS.

jobs.title: Software Engineer - React / Fullstack
jobs.description: Do you want to design and build attractive digital products and services? Do you want to play a key role in transforming our firm into an agile organization? We’re building modern, secure, and elegant digital products for our Wealth Management business users. As a React / Full Stack Engineer, you’ll design and ship end to end features, modernize our UI, integrate with resilient back end services, and help evolve our platform for the cloud. You’ll work in a collaborative, agile environment and play an active role in technical decisions, architecture patterns, and engineering culture. What you’ll do: • Build and integrate a new ReactJS-based UI with backend services, implementing key business functionality and preparing applications for the cloud. • Own and deliver features end-to-end, from requirements to deployment. • Collaborate with stakeholders, presenting work and incorporating feedback. • Apply best practices in Agile and DevOps, contribute to architectural decisions, and ensure solutions meet the highest standards of quality, security, reliability, and compliance. • Write and maintain tests (unit, integration, and end-to-end) to improve code coverage. • Guide and mentor team members through code reviews and knowledge sharing. • Troubleshoot and resolve frontend issues promptly, proposing effective solutions. • Advocate for client needs and ensure user-centric design in all deliverables. • Contribute to engineering culture and internal communities.

jobs.title: US Rates Strategist
jobs.description: UBS is seeking an intellectually curious and analytically driven individual to join our US Rates Strategy team. This role sits at the intersection of markets, economics, and quantitative analysis, with responsibility for translating complex data into clear, compelling insights to inform clients and internal stakeholders. In this role, you will: • Produce timely, high-quality research notes and strategy pieces on US rates markets, covering a broad range of topics including Treasury supply and demand dynamics, market structure, positioning, technicals, and yield curve analysis • Build and maintain quantitative models to analyze interest rate dynamics and support trade recommendations • Collaborate closely with sales, trading, and other research desks to ensure strategy content is relevant, well-distributed, and effectively communicated to clients • Monitor and respond to developments in US and global macro markets with well-reasoned, clearly communicated analysis

In this role, you will: • Produce timely, high-quality research notes and strategy pieces on US rates markets, covering a broad range of topics including Treasury supply and demand dynamics, market structure, positioning, technicals, and yield curve analysis • Build and maintain quantitative models to analyze interest rate dynamics and support trade recommendations • Collaborate closely with sales, trading, and other research desks to ensure strategy content is relevant, well-distributed, and effectively communicated to clients • Monitor and respond to developments in US and global macro markets with well-reasoned, clearly communicated analysis

jobs.title: Trade & Client Service Specialist
jobs.description: Are you looking for a new challenge within the fast-paced Wealth Management environment? Do you want to be part of a high performing team? Are you curious, proactive, and always striving to bring positive impact to clients? We’re looking for a Tade and Client Service Specialist to: • Support Client Advisors in UK & Jersey • Process client orders on an execution only basis covering equities, ETF's, fixed income, structured products, FX options, SPI's and hedge funds. • Ensuring that administrative arrangements and client-related processes are completed accurately • Carry out daily transaction processing and complex troubleshooting in line with WMUK & Jersey trading rules • Dealing directly with external and internal clients • Ensure all risk management controls are adhered to in order to identify and mitigate any potential risk and appropriate management information (MI) is produced • Manage the input and release of payments for the Jersey business. • Perform call backs on payments that fall within the relevant thresholds.

jobs.description: Are you interested in quantitative risk modelling and knowledgeable of statistical, mathematical and econometrical models used in the financial industry? Are you an innovative thinker who likes to challenge the status quo and apply new analytical techniques to solve quantitative problems? At UBS, we re-imagine the way we work, the way we connect with each other – our colleagues, clients and partners – and the way we deliver value. Being agile will make us more responsive, more adaptable, and ultimately more innovative. We’re looking for a Quantitative Analyst to develop and maintain stress testing and provisioning models: • develop and maintain stress testing and provisioning models in line with international regulatory and accounting standards requirements • support with ongoing and new regulatory initiatives to manage our risk • contribute to the development, refinement and implementation of risk models • perform and document model performance and confirmation analysis • communicate technical information to Senior Management, Risk Officers and Subject Matter Experts

jobs.title: Investment Banking Analyst / Associate
jobs.description: Do you enjoy working in dynamic teams? Are you excited by the opportunity to work on complex and market leading transactions? Are you solutions oriented? We’re looking for someone like that who can: – work together with senior bankers within the team and broader Global Banking to originate business, including developing pitch book presentations, financial modelling, and keeping up to date on marketing materials; – coordinate with our product team partners and sector coverage teams located in other geographies to develop cross-product ideas; – build and maintain client relationships to expand their network; – actively participate in all phases of the transaction process including financial modeling, due diligence, internal credit approval, drafting investor materials, loan syndications; and – develop a broad skill base including an understanding of a range of UBS industry sectors and product groups.

jobs.title: Intern
jobs.description: Are you a motivated self-starter? Can you take an assignment and run with it? If you're ready to dive into a client-focused work environment, an internship at UBS Wealth Management may be the right fit for you. We welcome interns to join our team to learn about the Wealth Management industry and our firm. Our financial advisors and their teams deliver a fully integrated set of products and services specifically designed to address the needs of ultra-high net worth and high-net worth individuals and families. This is an opportunity to gain valuable insight, develop new skills, and establish a network of mentors and business contacts. We're looking for an intern to: • work on projects that have a real impact on clients and gain product knowledge • support our team of Wealth Management advisors and wealth strategy associates • compile market and investment research • leverage Microsoft Excel skills to assist with portfolio analysis • prepare client meeting materials and generate performance reports • assist with the responsibilities of running an entrepreneurial business model • attend presentations by WMA leaders to help you understand our industry, culture and strategy

jobs.title: Execution Hub Trader
jobs.description: Are you a motivated team-player with a keen eye for details? Are you analytical and thrive in high-pressure environment? Do you have knowledge of mutual funds and alternative investments? We’re looking for someone who can • facilitate timely and accurate market-side order placement and market-side finishing activities, including but not limited to, active order monitoring and chasing late confirmations, prompt detection of irregularities and efficient exception handling • effectively manage client-side sales trading activities including advisory on order entry, special handling and pre/at-trade execution-related client queries originating from Wealth Management clients and 3rd party Financial Institutions • handle inbound information in Central information Management system received from Transfer Agent • support and/or drive initiatives to improve efficiency and manage risk; proactively keeping in step with market development • follow rules and regulations, compliance guidelines and desk procedures/protocols

jobs.title: Equity Research Analyst – Financials
jobs.description: Do you want to use your fundamental equity market expertise and portfolio management knowledge to help manage portfolios and identify new investment opportunities? Do you enjoy uncovering what really drives value in financial institutions? Can you turn deep analysis into clear investment views that shape portfolios? We’re looking for a Equity Research Analyst - Financials, to: • generate differentiated bottom-up investment ideas across the financials sector (e.g banks, insurers, capital markets, specialty finance) for our client portfolios • conduct proprietary research through management meetings, industry expert calls, industry conferences, filings, and data analysis to formulate differentiated insights and form high-conviction investment views • build and maintain detailed financial models, including stress testing under different macro scenarios • translate detailed fundamental analysis into clear investment recommendations that support portfolio decisions • partner closely with portfolio managers to move ideas from research into our portfolios • convert industry insights into comprehensive investment recommendations and risk assessments • communicate insights clearly and succinctly through written notes and presentations to colleagues and clients

jobs.description: Are you an experienced and entrepreneurial product manager with deep expertise in wealth management? Are you passionate about shaping and delivering AI-powered solutions that transform client and advisor experiences? Do you thrive at the intersection of domain knowledge, AI innovation, and digital transformation? We are looking for an AI Product Manager to: • identify, prioritize, and deliver AI/ML solutions that address real client and advisor needs within a regulated environment • own the product lifecycle from ideation and prototyping to pilot and full-scale rollout—ensuring solutions are both innovative and practical for wealth management use cases • collaborate closely with stakeholders across business, technology, and data science, translating complex requirements into actionable product roadmaps • drive agile delivery through sprint planning, continuous prioritization, and clear success metrics, ensuring timely and impactful outcomes • champion new AI capabilities such as personalization, intelligent insights, and digital advisory tools, always with a focus on client value and regulatory compliance • act as an entrepreneurial leader, proactively identifying opportunities, challenging the status quo, and fostering a culture of innovation within the team • engage with external partners (e.g., Microsoft, fintechs) to explore, test, and scale cutting-edge AI solutions relevant to wealth management

jobs.title: Mutual Fund Product Specialist
jobs.description: Are you passionate about driving client success through strategic mutual fund solutions? Ready to lead collaborative efforts across internal and external stakeholders to optimize service and product delivery? Are you driven by a deep interest in investment product management, eager to shape and innovate our offering to meet evolving market demands? We’re looking for someone like that who can help us: • Lead and direct the domestic and offshore mutual fund and money market fund business as the primary subject matter expert, providing strategic guidance to the Advisory Sales Desk, advisory program teams, Service Group, CIO, Advanced Planning, and other internal stakeholders. • Drive the resolution of complex trading and operational challenges • Foster strong relationships with internal partners, fund companies, and the field. • Strategically manage relationships with over 450 mutual fund providers, partnering with Legal to manage the contract lifecycle, including creation, negotiation and execution of distribution agreement • Develop and maintain marketing, disclosure, training, and educational materials, including managing internal and public website content. • Identify opportunities to increase product awareness among Financial Advisors and clients and explore new product offerings with fund partners to support business growth and CIO alignment. • Manage a suite of projects to enhance operational efficiency, improve the FA and client experience, and unlock revenue and cost saving opportunities. • Forge and cultivate key partnerships across the firm to develop deep expertise in platforms and product offerings, encompassing both traditional and non-traditional assets. • Monitor and analyze legislative, regulatory, and industry developments and lead the implementation of enhancements in collaboration with the Public Policy Office and internal control partners.

We’re looking for someone like that who can help us: • Lead and direct the domestic and offshore mutual fund and money market fund business as the primary subject matter expert, providing strategic guidance to the Advisory Sales Desk, advisory program teams, Service Group, CIO, Advanced Planning, and other internal stakeholders. • Drive the resolution of complex trading and operational challenges • Foster strong relationships with internal partners, fund companies, and the field. • Strategically manage relationships with over 450 mutual fund providers, partnering with Legal to manage the contract lifecycle, including creation, negotiation and execution of distribution agreement • Develop and maintain marketing, disclosure, training, and educational materials, including managing internal and public website content. • Identify opportunities to increase product awareness among Financial Advisors and clients and explore new product offerings with fund partners to support business growth and CIO alignment. • Manage a suite of projects to enhance operational efficiency, improve the FA and client experience, and unlock revenue and cost saving opportunities. • Forge and cultivate key partnerships across the firm to develop deep expertise in platforms and product offerings, encompassing both traditional and non-traditional assets. • Monitor and analyze legislative, regulatory, and industry developments and lead the implementation of enhancements in collaboration with the Public Policy Office and internal control partners.

jobs.title: IB BRM – Operational Risk Manager

titleByLocale.it: IB BRM – Gestione del rischio operativo

jobs.description: Are you able to evaluate risk by understanding and talking to the business? Are you self-motivated and driven with vision, ability to drive multiple work streams with stringent deadlines? We’re looking for someone like that who can provide operational risk support to IB, specifically to: – act as a point of contact within the global IB BRM team based in Hong Kong, working in partnership with the business and our logistics & control partners across a broad spectrum of Operational Risk Management objectives. – work on a number of operational risk change initiatives working closely with stakeholders across the Investment Bank COO and other functions globally – monitor and challenge global functions on their delivery of the front to back control environment. Making recommendations on controls design and operating effectiveness – review and analyze operational risk events and escalations for trends and track actions to resolution. – provide proactive and constructive challenge in all aspects of the role, encouraging best practice and striving for consistency on a global basis – support Operational Risk initiatives cross IB and provide input for the ongoing development of them – provide support to Product-aligned COOs on various control improvement and remediation initiatives. – provide transparent risk reporting to management, auditors and regulators – identify, evaluate and mitigate risks, proactively formulate global solutions – act as an SME on operational risk framework for the Investment Bank and other relevant key stakeholders – contribute to design and documentation of control processes and procedures and identify, evaluate and mitigate risks for deficient controls

jobs.title: APAC Regional Lead - Agency Trading Market Engineering Technology

titleByLocale.en: APAC Regional Lead - Agency Trading Market Engineering Technology
titleByLocale.it: APAC Regional Lead - Agenzia Trading Market Engineering Technology
titleByLocale.de: APAC Regional Lead - Agency Trading Market Engineering Technology
titleByLocale.fr: APAC Regional Lead - Agency Trading Market Engineering Technology

jobs.description: As APAC Regional Lead for Market Engineering Technology, you will serve as the senior technology executive and primary business interface accountable for Agency Trading Market Engineering platforms across APAC, with leadership responsibility for Agency Trading Technology in Hong Kong. This role carries end to end accountability for platform performance, resilience, and regulatory standing, ensuring that technology is a differentiating enabler of front office trading while operating within the firm’s risk and control framework. You will operate at the intersection of engineering leadership, business partnership, and regulatory accountability, shaping both the technical direction and organizational capability required to support high volume, low latency trading in complex APAC markets. Acting as the regional face of Technology, you will lead through senior leaders, influence global direction, and serve as the ultimate escalation authority for material delivery, production risk, and regulatory matters.

jobs.title: Data Engineer-Python, Pyspark, sql, Databricks
jobs.description: Are you passionate about data engineering? Are you keen to manage data that can materially help teams improve the way they work? You have the opportunity to join the team working on the new DevLens initiative, an ambitious data initiative to help our 40,000 IT employees organization accelerate value delivery to customers, improve organization efficiency and developer experience. Together with your team you will contribute to building and maintaining innovative data products spanning all engineering activities across UBS IT lines of business. You will work with large delta tables on Azure Databricks with Dagster, AKS, PySpark & SparkSQL, Confluent Kafka, REST APIs, database platforms, serving data products on Starburst/Trino data mesh. We’re looking for a passionate Data Engineer to: • Develop, support and improve data pipelines and data products with attention to governance including sourcing, lineage, modelling, security, quality, distribution and efficiency • Automate testing & deployment where possible using CI/CD pipelines • Build observability to monitor and resolve production issues • Analyse and organize raw data and be able to combine multiple datasets of varying quality • Take ownership and drive deliveries within a supportive team environment • Follow engineering best practices, and ensure bank & regulatory compliance across the lifecycle • Ensure the quality, security, reliability, and compliance of our solutions, promote re-use where possible. • Help manage the department data inventory and data products • Provide data support to internal & external stakeholders • Be comfortable within a geographically spread, fast-moving Agile team • Continuously up-skill, learn new technologies and practices, reuse strategic platforms and standards, evaluate options, and make decisions with long-term sustainability in mind.

jobs.title: Sachbearbeiter /in Kindes- und Erwachsenenschutzrecht
jobs.description: Haben Sie Interesse an Themen mit rechtlichem Bezug und eine gute Auffassungsgabe? Sind effizientes und exaktes Arbeiten Ihre Stärken? Suchen Sie den Einstieg in die Finanzbranche? Wir suchen eine/n Sachbearbeiter/in Kindes- und Erwachsenenschutzrecht als Verstärkung für unser Team mit folgenden Aufgaben: • Analyse und Bearbeitung von behördlichen Massnahmen der Kindes- und Erwachsenenschutzbehörde mittels Recherche und Mutationen im eigenen Banksystem • Abwicklung von nicht-behördlichen Massnahmen in Form von Vorsorgeaufträgen und Vertretung von Ehegatten • Durchführung von Kindsvermögenssicherungsmassnahmen • Formelle sowie materielle Kontrolle der Legitimationen wie auch Dokumentation der Massnahmen • Telefonische und schriftliche Unterstützung von Kundenberater/Innen bezüglich fachlicher Anfragen • Telefonischer und schriftlicher Kontakt mit Behörden, Ämtern, Anwälten wie auch Notaren • Allgemeine administrative Arbeiten

jobs.title: Client Service Core Specialist in Asset Management Team

titleByLocale.en: Client Service Core Specialist in Asset Management Team
titleByLocale.it: Client Service Core Specialista in Asset Management Team
titleByLocale.de: Client Service Core Spezialist in Asset Management Team
titleByLocale.fr: Client Service Core Spécialiste in Asset Management Team

jobs.description: Do you like to contribute to great client experience and to interact with sales colleagues globally? Is a client-oriented mindset important to you and your trademark? Are you commercially minded and driven to help build a business? If yes, then we are looking for you. We’re searching for a Client Service Core Specialist in UBS Asset Management to: • Maintain and monitor data quality (e.g., agreement updates, accounts mapping, client reporting related information) for our clients such as pension funds, sovereign wealth clients and distributors in central systems. • Act as the main point of contact for client inquiries, coordinate responses with internal teams, manage complaints, and ensure client satisfaction by delivering timely and accurate information and services. • Attend, host, and prepare for training days, due diligence meetings, and sales pitches. Organize materials, logistics, and follow-up communications in partnership with the Client Relationship Manager (CRM). • Handle RFP coordination, cash-flow notifications, fund launches/changes, and support life-cycle changes and maintain accurate client data in internal systems. • Oversee fee invoicing, trailer fee approvals, payment coordination, and proactively manage outstanding invoices (aged debtors). • Execute processes and controls in a timely, accurate, and complete manner and ensure compliance with regulations and manage audit requests. • Contribute to and potentially lead projects to further improve the Client Service function.

jobs.description: UBS Business Solutions US LLC is seeking an Authorized Officer, Operational Risk and Data Specialist in Weehawken, NJ Are you an innovative thinker? Do you enjoy delivering enhanced change capabilities across a range of business functions? Are you incredibly organized with an eye for detail? We’re looking for an Authorized Officer, Operational Risk and Data Specialist to: • Support and coordinate the preparation of regulatory operational risk reports and metrics. Perform analytical reviews, including data analysis and creating presentations of key operational risk metrics to senior management. • Triage with other teams globally to ensure an efficient reporting process. Prepare and review the CCAR quarterly reporting submissions to respective supervisory authorities. • Extract meaningful business insights from large sets of data and report to senior management. Assist in the data identification and mining process for internal loss events that supports CCAR Operational Risk processes. • Review external events and other metrics to support the CCAR Operational Risk process. • Can work hybrid (In-office/remote). Qualified Applicants apply through SH-ProfRecruitingcc@ubs.com. Please reference 001683. NO CALLS PLEASE. EOE/M/F/D/V Salary Range & Work Schedule: $101,500 to $131,000/year, 40 hrs/wk. This notice is being posted in connection with an application for permanent Alien Labor Certification. Any person may comment or provide documentary evidence bearing on this application to: U.S. Department of Labor, Employment and Training Administration, Office of Foreign Labor Certification, 200 Constitution Avenue NW, Room N-5311, Washington, DC 20210. The expected salary range(s) for this role as of the date of this posting is/are based on factors including, but not limited to, experience, qualifications, education, location and skill level. This role may also be eligible for discretionary incentive compensation. For benefits information, please visit ubs.com/usbenefits.

jobs.title: Spécialiste Crédits 80-100%
jobs.description: Êtes-vous passionné par les prêts bancaires ? Vous êtes autonome, fiable et possédez une grande conscience professionnelle ? Vous appréciez travailler dans un environnement dynamique et stimulant où les objectifs vous motivent ? Si vous avez répondu oui à ces questions, alors rejoignez notre équipe Credit Services et faites partie d'une entreprise où votre talent sera reconnu et valorisé. En tant que spécialiste crédits, vous serez chargé de : • traiter les demandes de prêt approuvées à l'échelle nationale, en jouant un rôle clé dans la réalisation des projets de nos clients • préparer les contrats de crédit avec les documents de sûreté appropriés, assurant ainsi la documentation nécessaire à nos prêts • saisir et gérer les crédits et garanties (p.ex. les cédules hypothécaires, polices et cautions) • emettre les promesses de paiement et leur exécution • assurer la correspondance et le dialogue avec les registres fonciers, notaires, banques et compagnies d’assurance, établissant des relations de confiance avec nos partenaires • maintenir des contacts professionnels avec les conseillers à la clientèle, les Credit Officers et les services juridiques

jobs.title: Spezialist/in Hypotheken und Grundbuchwesen 80 – 100%
jobs.description: Hast du Erfahrungen in der Hypothekarverarbeitung und dem Schweizerischen Grundbuchwesen? Ist effizientes, exaktes und verantwortungsbewusstes Arbeiten genau deine Stärke? Hast du Freude an administrativen Tätigkeiten mit flexiblen Arbeitszeiten? Dann bewirb dich, denn wir wollen wachsen und suchen Verstärkung! Deine Aufgaben: • Selbständige Abwicklung der bewilligten Kreditgesuche • Erstellen von allen notwendigen Kredit- und Sicherungsdokumenten • Abbilden und Bewirtschaften von Hypotheken und Sicherheiten (z.B. Grundpfänder, Policen, Bürgschaften) • Erstellen von Zahlungsversprechen sowie fristgerechter Ausführung von Zahlungen • Sicherstellung aller Bedingungen für die Freigabe der Hypotheken und Zahlungen • Begleitung und korrekte Terminierung der Geschäftsfälle in Eigenverantwortung • Korrespondenz mit Grundbuchämtern, Notaren, Banken und Versicherungsgesellschaften • Pflichtbewusster Umgang mit potenziellen Risiken

jobs.title: Technical Architect
jobs.description: • Do you enjoy creating and maintaining a strong and stable architectural foundation on which innovative, creative, and sustainable solutions can be built? Do you want to be part of an externally recognized community with personal development at its core? Do you want to join a diverse and collaborative team that doesn’t just focus on work? We are seeking an experienced Enterprise Application Architect with a strong background in Java, Azure, and on-premises solutions. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in designing, developing, and implementing scalable, secure, and high-performing enterprise applications. This role requires a deep understanding of cloud and on-premises architectures, microservices, and API-based integration. • Solution Architecture & Design: • Architect and design enterprise-grade solutions leveraging Java, Azure services, and on-premises infrastructure. • Demonstrate knowledge of architecture patterns (e.g., layered, event-driven, CQRS), code-level patterns (e.g., factory, strategy, decorator), and data patterns (e.g., data mesh, event sourcing, medallion architecture). • Develop scalable, resilient, and secure API-based integration solutions for internal and external applications. • Apply domain-driven design (DDD) and microservices architecture to design robust solutions. • Define Azure Integration Services strategy using Azure API Management, Service Bus, Logic Apps, Event Grid, Function Apps, and Data Factory. • Must be hands-on with Java and capable of designing high-throughput, low-latency systems.

jobs.title: Investment Banking Analyst
jobs.description: Are you a strategic thinker with a passion for financial markets? Do you thrive in fast-paced environments and enjoy solving complex problems? Are you ready to contribute to high-impact transactions and build lasting client relationships? We’re looking for an investment banking analyst to: • develop pitch book presentations that explain industry trends, outline strategic options, and recommend actionable solutions to meet client goals • create and analyze financial models to support valuation, transaction structuring, and scenario planning • collaborate with senior bankers and cross-functional teams to identify and address client needs • contribute innovative ideas and approaches that drive business growth and client engagement • support transaction execution across Mergers & Acquisitions, equity and debt financings, and other advisory mandates

jobs.title: Fixed Income Structurer
jobs.description: We are seeking a senior structurer to play a leading role within our Fixed Income Structuring team, with a particular focus on credit markets. The role combines product origination, client engagement, advanced structuring and pricing, and some leadership responsibility. Key responsibilities include: • Lead the structuring, pricing, execution, and documentation of complex fixed income transactions across OTC and structured note formats • Act as a senior point of reference for credit markets, contributing to product strategy, risk discussion, and desk wide innovation • Originate trade ideas and client solutions, working closely with sales to engage directly with clients, understand their objectives, and deliver tailored outcomes • Design, model, and price bespoke payoffs across credit and rates products, including scenario analysis, stress testing, and lifecycle risk management • Provide deep expertise on documentation, including ISDA, credit annexes, and structured note documentation, coordinating with legal, operations, and risk to ensure robust execution • Lead and mentor junior structurers, setting technical standards, reviewing work, and supporting their development • Drive platform and process improvements, including enhancement of analytical tools, pricers, automation of pricing runs, and scalable trade processes • Collaborate closely with trading, sales, risk, legal, and compliance, exercising sound judgment expected of a senior front office professional
